ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "assistant_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistant team manager */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "inning_name" TEXT /* Name of the inning (e.g., First Inning, Second Inning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inning the statistic belongs to */,
  "pa" INTEGER /* Plate appearances */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At bats */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits */,
  "h2b" INTEGER /* Doubles */,
  "h3b" INTEGER /* Triples */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on balls */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "sb" INTEGER /* Stolen bases */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Caught stealing */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Hit by pitch */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "obp" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "batting_avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the player is associated with */,
  "pa" INTEGER /* Plate appearances */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At bats */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits */,
  "h2b" INTEGER /* Doubles */,
  "h3b" INTEGER /* Triples */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on balls */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "sb" INTEGER /* Stolen bases */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Caught stealing */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Hit by pitch */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "obp" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the analyst belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

Name of the assistant team manager

State where the team is located
